properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 51/18
NORWEGIAN SEA. 
TORPEDO FIRING EXERCISES.
THE GERMAN NAVY WILL CARRY OUT TORPEDO FIRING EXERCISES DURING THE PERIOD MAY 23ND - MAY 31ST 2018.
THE EXERCISE AREAS ARE WITHIN A RADIUS OF 10 NM FROM THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS: WGS84 DATUM
A. 70-15.0 N 014-45.0 E PRIMARY AREA
B.  68-45.0 N 002-15.0 E SECONDARY AREA
FIRING EXERCISES WILL BE CARRIED OUT BY GERMAN P3C PATROL AIRCRAFTS WITHIN THE FOLLOWING FOUR PERIODS: 
MAY 23RD, 25TH, 29TH AND 31TH, BETWEEN 08:30 - 12:00  UTC
THE AIRCRAFT WILL LISTEN TO MARITIME VHF CHANNEL 16, AND WILL CLEAR THE AREA BEFORE SHOOTING. 
CHARTS: 303, 321, 515.
